{
  "judge_id": "JG-001",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 4,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 4
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The output introduces a new framing that maps against the nearest works, identifying specific differences and avoiding rhetorical claims of novelty.",
    "R1.7": "The output flags one missing detail (the exact number of graphs in Long et al.'s evaluation) and provides some context on the Tübingen pairs benchmark.",
    "RX.1": "Uncertainty is disclosed for the existence and details of cited works, as well as the exact nature of the ID-algorithm verifier.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed scope without any drift or additional claims.",
    "RX.4": "There are no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content introduced; however, there is a minor regression in the Tübingen pairs description.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.8,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 1.0,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The output introduces a new framing that maps against the nearest works, identifying specific differences and avoiding rhetorical claims of novelty.
rationale.R1.7: The output flags one missing detail (the exact number of graphs in Long et al.'s evaluation) and provides some context on the Tübingen pairs benchmark.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty is disclosed for the existence and details of cited works, as well as the exact nature of the ID-algorithm verifier.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed scope without any drift or additional claims.
rationale.RX.4: There are no new errors, fabrications, or harmful content introduced; however, there is a minor regression in the Tübingen pairs description.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
